phrases.intent_en: Where is Town Hall tower entrance?
phrases.text_local: Kde je vstup na radniční věž?
phrases.cultural_note: Town Halls often have separate, less obvious entrances for tower access.

likely_response.local: Dobrý den, vchod je z boční ulice.
likely_response.translation_en: Hello, the entrance is from the side street.

responses.english: Hello, the entrance is from the side street.
responses.french: Dobrý den, vchod je z boční ulice.

phrases.cultural_note: The UNESCO-listed column is the most prominent and logical meeting point on the square.
The fountain is a key landmark directly facing the Town Hall building.

likely_response.translation_en: Right in front of the town hall.

responses.english: Right in front of the town hall.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay at café terrace?
phrases.cultural_note: In Czech cafés, it's standard practice to pay the waiter directly at your table.

likely_response.local: Ano, obsluha vyúčtuje přímo u stolu.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the staff will settle the bill right at the table.

responses.english: Yes, the staff will settle the bill right at the table.
responses.french: Ano, obsluha vyúčtuje přímo u stolu.
